raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The new mobile health pilot program will provide virtual medical consultations and mental health services to farmworkers in rural communities.",
    "The program is designed to improve health outcomes in underserved communities.",
    "The pilot program serves approximately 120 people per week.",
    "Advanced technology and dedicated staff have been identified as critical factors in reaching vulnerable populations.",
    "SB 338 aims to establish the Mobile Health for Rural Communities Pilot Program.",
    "Mobile health units will be equipped with virtual consultation capabilities.",
    "The pilot program will monitor and report outcomes to the Legislature by January 1, 2027.",
    "Many farmworkers in California struggle to access basic health care.",
    "Access issues create significant obstacles that lead farmworkers to delay or forgo necessary medical care.",
    "Higher rates of preventable conditions, such as high blood pressure, diabetes, and respiratory illnesses, have been reported among farmworkers."
  ]
}
```
